settings.name: Vivek
settings.title: Software Engineer
settings.summary: Experienced Software Engineer specializing in backend development, API optimization, and building scalable web applications with modern technologies.

items.description: • Geolocation Accuracy Enhancement: Automated MaxMind GeoIP database updates, improving country accuracy from 95% to 99%, city accuracy from 61% to 97%, and reducing incorrect city mappings from 36% to under 3%. • Email Infrastructure Optimization: Migrated email delivery from SMTP to AWS SES with Kafka-based async acknowledgments, achieving 6x faster response time (900ms to 150ms), 70% CPU reduction, and failure rate drop from 20% to under 1%. • Unified three authentication APIs into a single endpoint and enforced geo-blocking for sensitive operations, reducing server load while strengthening fraud prevention and compliance. • Security Token Vulnerability Fix: Disabled rotation for transaction tokens being misused as long-lived auth tokens, eliminating a critical unauthorized access vulnerability. • XSS Protection Implementation: Moved session cookie creation to backend with HttpOnly flag enforcement, closing XSS attack vectors and securing token confidentiality.

• Refined and optimized backend APIs and user workflows for an edtech platform, fixing 15+ bugs and adding new booking, editing, and cancellation features, improving engagement for 600+ users. • Enhanced frontend performance and UX by improving mentor dashboards, session tracking, and community pages, resulting in 20% higher user retention. • Created a 3D immersive environment using Babylon.js, Blender, and Mixamo animations, enabling real-time avatar movement and customization for an interactive user experience.

• Developed authentication flow and REST APIs for a social media app using Node.js and TypeScript, handling 100+ daily active users. • Built features like image/video posts, stories, likes, and event management for real estate agents. • Designed and engineered admin dashboard UI with React.js and TypeScript to manage 1000s of users. • Used MongoDB for scalable data storage and optimized querying for high-volume real estate content.

items.title: DevNaukri
items.description: Launched a job portal using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, featuring 60+ jobs from 50+ companies. Achieved 8500+ visitors and 35,000+ page views, connecting job seekers and employers. Utilized PostgreSQL and Prisma ORM to efficiently manage job listings and application data, ensuring robust database performance and scalability.

items.title: Study Notion
items.description: Architected a responsive Ed-tech platform for 35+ test users to create, consume, and rate content with full authentication & authorization. Integrated Razorpay for secure payments, enhancing course enrollment and instructor earnings. Established robust RESTful communication between frontend and backend services and validated all flows using Postman.

items.title: Solved 1000+ Problems on Leetcode and Best Rating 1714
All India Rank (AIR) 359 in Leetcode Biweekly Contest 105
105000+ Blog views on leetcode with 800+ stars
